name: Booster Racers
short_description: Are you ready to show your competitiveness? Here is Booster Racers, a chaotic racing game that you can play together with a friend in local multiplayer, or you can play alone too if you have no friends.
detailed_description:
Booster Racers is a local multiplayer chaotic racing game that takes you through varied and colorful racing tracks that share satisfying soundtracks.

Customize your racing car and face up to five rival racers on any track, either with a friend locally, or alone, either way you don't need to depend on someone to have fun from the chaos that the mysterious objects provided within the racing tracks.

Booster Racers has been created by Chrez Studio, an indie developer about to graduate from university.
